note: Advisory sandbox verifier. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED verdicts, never PASS. The tool itself is the trust spine; it never edits the subject receipt.
title: Signal Factory structural receipt verifier

subject.note: Encodes the Signal Factory v1 output contract as a JSON schema; verdicts written to scratch verdicts/, fixtures verified unchanged (sha stable).

what_it_proves: conformant SYNTHETIC receipt -> CHECK_OK (schema-valid + author!=subject + all scores 0..5 + risk_score mirrors scores.risk)
author == subject -> CHECK_REJECTED citing the author!=subject independence rule (the triage agent must differ from the signal's subject)
any score pushed out of 0..5 (trust/risk/automation_value/commercial_value) -> CHECK_REJECTED (schema maximum + explicit contract bound-check)
bad enum / missing required field re-rejects -> schema is NEVER relaxed to admit a receipt
risk_score that stops matching scores.risk -> CHECK_REJECTED
running the verifier leaves the subject receipt byte-identical (sha unchanged); verdict emitted to scratch verdicts/

red_capability.canary: redrun-canary.txt asserts the self-triage (author==subject) receipt is CHECK_OK; verifier REJECTS it, so the deliberately-wrong assertion fires -> proves the spine has teeth

b4_guards.language_gate_dogfood: N/A — CO-5 emits no commercial/marketing HTML; deliverable is a structural verifier + JSON schema. Red-capable proof is the data-driven mutation discriminator, which the spec allows as the alternative to the overclaim-dogfood path.
b4_guards.synthetic_watermark: all fixtures carry a SYNTHETIC — not a guaranteed claim watermark; no real inbound signal data used
b4_guards.no_autonomy_claims: verifier is advisory-only (authority=none); makes no autonomy or guaranteed-outcome claim

locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (subject fixtures/schema unmodified, verdicts to scratch)
no live call / no network / no send
next_action: advisory only — CO-5 verifier available for Signal Factory receipt structural checks; no downstream execution authority
